title: Anime Modpack
description: It allows you to experience the excitement of epic battles, transformations, and stories as a character from your favorite anime.
body:
![image 1.1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9b984621099e2fc4b46002c208c1601349e0ed00.png)

Anime Modpack transforms Minecraft into a vibrant, action-packed universe inspired by your favorite anime series. Experience powerful abilities, cinematic movement, stylish outfits, and an atmosphere filled with color, magic, and personality.

✨ 🗡️ Anime-Inspired Powers & Combat

Enter battles worthy of an anime protagonist

Master cursed techniques, fight dangerous spirits, and unlock iconic abilities. Shape your destiny as a powerful sorcerer.
• DNote Mod
Step into a darker role by wielding a death note. Change the fate of others with a simple name—strategic gameplay.

👘 ✨ Anime Fashion & Character Customization

Design your own anime-style hero or villain:
• Poke Clothing

Adorable poke-inspired outfits that bring charm and nostalgia.
• Accessories & Trinkets

Add earrings, tails, horns, backpacks, jewelry and other stylish add-ons for full anime personality.
• 3D Skin Layers
Make your character more expressive and lively with enhanced 3D details.


🎬 ⚡ Smooth, Cinematic Animations

Feel like you're watching (or starring in) an anime:

Not Enough Animations – Fluid item holding, swimming, running, and combat animations.
Better Animations Collection – More expressive character motion.
Player Animator & Animation Library – Advanced, cinematic movements.
Eating Animation – Cute and immersive eating effects.
Spawn Animations – Dramatic mob introduction animations.
Presence Footsteps – Anime-style immersive footsteps.

🌍 ✨ A Beautiful, Atmospheric World

Explore landscapes that feel pulled from an anime adventure:

Incendium & Nullscape – Reimagined Nether and End with epic vistas.
Small Ships & Ships – Sail great oceans like a true pirate crew.
Falling Leaves, Dynamic Lights & Sound Physics – Natural beauty and immersive ambience.

⚙️ 🔧 Optimized Performance

Even with its anime flair, Anime Modpack is engineered to run smoothly:

Sodium, Lithium, FerriteCore, ModernFix, ImmediatelyFast
Entity Culling & More Culling
Dynamic FPS & BadOptimizations
Enjoy stable performance—even with shaders.

🎨 🖌️ Shader-Friendly Anime Aesthetic

Compatible with:

Iris Shaders – For dramatic lighting and vibrant colors.
Animatica + Continuity – Smooth visuals and connected textures.

🧭 ✨ Exploration, Magic & Quality of Life

Featuring tools and upgrades that make your adventure deeper and more enjoyable:
Waystones – Fast travel system
JEI – Recipe viewer
Artifacts – Unique equipment
Farm & Charm, Witchcraft – Cozy rural life and mystical gameplay
